channel.title: Trần Trung Hiếu — blog
channel.description: Engineering write-ups from the mobile and full-stack products I build and ship.

item.title: Running on a 2013 phone: the native low-end tech stack behind ProFocus
item.description: ProFocus turns a spare phone into a desk clock, focus timer, and WiFi photo frame. Supporting that means running on Android 4.3 and iOS 12, with no Firebase and no Play Services. Here is how I built it.
